market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Highly suppressed volatility due to massive positive GEX. Expect mean-reverting, choppy price action tightly pinned around current levels.
outlook.summary: Market makers are heavily long gamma, creating a stabilizing feedback loop. Spot is experiencing extreme magnetic attraction to the 28150 strike due to massive 0DTE volume. Upside is strictly capped by dealer hedging flows at 28200, while 28000 acts as immediate structural support.

levels.motivazione: Extreme 0DTE Call OI and massive volume (3187) exactly at spot. Positive GEX creates strong magnetic pinning for market maker hedging.
Significant Call OI in both 0DTE and Weekly expiries. Positive GEX ensures dealer selling into strength creates a rigid resistance ceiling.
Strong Call OI concentration across 0DTE and Weekly. Dealers buying dips around this level provide solid structural support.
0DTE Max Pain coincides with heavy Monthly Call OI (257) and notable Put OI. Acts as a structural backstop and hedging anchor.
Dominant Call OI in both Weekly (147) and Monthly (207) expiries. Defines the absolute upside limit for the current cycle.
